faq.label: Frequently asked
faq.title: Everything you need to know.
faq.subtitle: Can't find an answer? Write us, we're happy to help.
faq.q1: How does the 14-day free trial work?
faq.a1: When you sign up for PRO or BUSINESS, no credit card is required. You get full access to all features for 14 days, completely free. After the trial, you can choose — continue for €8/mo (PRO) or stay on the free FREE plan. We never charge you automatically.
faq.a2: Yes. No notice period, no penalties. Just click "Cancel subscription" in settings and you can keep using until the end of your paid period. Your data stays safely stored — if you return, you'll find everything in its place.
faq.a3: Housio runs on enterprise infrastructure (Supabase + Vercel) with European servers. All data is encrypted, automatically backed up and protected under GDPR. Your contracts and tenants' personal data are safe — we never share them with third parties.
faq.q4: Which countries does Housio work in?
faq.a4: Housio is designed for the whole EU. We support Czech, English, German, Italian and Spanish. You can work in CZK, EUR, PLN, CHF and other currencies. Whether you're a landlord in Prague, Vienna, Berlin, Rome or Madrid — Housio understands you.
faq.q5: What if I have more than 5 properties?
faq.a5: The PRO plan covers up to 5 properties for €8/mo. If you have more, the BUSINESS plan (€20/mo) gives you unlimited properties + multi-user team access, PDF reports and API. For managers with dozens of properties, it's the optimal choice.
faq.q6: Can I use Housio on mobile?
faq.a6: Yes. Housio is fully responsive — it works equally well on mobile, tablet and desktop. No app installation needed. Just open housio.app in your browser, sign in and have everything in one place. Everything syncs in real time.
faq.q7: Do you send contract expiration alerts?
faq.a7: Yes, automatically. Housio notifies you by email 30, 14 and 7 days before contract end. Never forget to renew and never lose a tenant. You'll also receive notifications about unpaid rent or approaching insurance expiration.
faq.a8: Absolutely. With BUSINESS, you generate PDF reports for accountants, banks or tax advisors. Done in 10 seconds. You also have API access to integrate with your own systems. Your data is always yours — no vendor lock-in.
faq.emailUs: Write us an email and we'll respond within 24 hours.
